skipped.message: Reason: Slow CI machine prevents this test from succeding ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_pp_laboratory.R:1:1')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_glm_counts_Module_initializes_in_teal_without_errors_and_produces_table_output.

error.message: Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. ('test-tm_t_glm_counts.R:59:5')

testcase.error:
Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true Caused by error in `chromote_wait_for_condition()`: ! Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true
i You can inspect the failed AppDriver object via `rlang::last_error()$app` i AppDriver logs: {shinytest2} R info 14:27:09.32 Start AppDriver initialization {shinytest2} R info 14:27:09.40 Starting Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 14:27:11.66 Creating new ChromoteSession {shinytest2} R info 14:27:11.72 Navigating to Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 14:27:11.84 Injecting shiny-tracer.js {chromote} JS info 14:27:11.86 shinytest2; jQuery not found {chromote} JS info 14:27:11.86 shinytest2; Loaded {shinytest2} R info 14:27:11.87 Waiting for Shiny to become ready {shinytest2} R info 14:28:11.97 Error while initializing AppDriver: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true Caused by error in `chromote_wait_for_condition()`: ! Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: shiny {shiny} R stderr ----------- Attempting to load the environment ‘package:forcats’ {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.data {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.code {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.slice {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- You are using teal version 1.1.0.9031 {shiny} R stderr tryCatchList {shiny} R stderr ----------- 2: tryCatchList {shiny} R stderr ----------- 1: base::tryCatch
Caused by error in `app_initialize_()`: ! Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms. Message: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true Caused by error in `chromote_wait_for_condition()`: ! Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 60000 i `script`: window.shinytest2 && window.shinytest2.ready === true Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) app_driver_tm_t_glm_counts() at test-tm_t_glm_counts.R:59:5 2. | \-teal.modules.clinical:::init_teal_app_driver(...) at test-tm_t_glm_counts.R:24:3 3. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:26:3 4. | \-TealAppDriver$new(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:29:7 5. | \-teal (local) initialize(...) 6. | +-base::suppressWarnings(...) 7. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 8. | +-withr::with_envvar(...) 9. | | \-base::force(code) 10. | \-super$initialize(...) 11. | \-shinytest2:::app_initialize(...) 12. | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 13. | \-shinytest2:::app_initialize_(self, private, ..., view = view) 14. | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 15. | \-self$wait_for_js(...) 16. | \-shinytest2:::app_wait_for_js(...) 17. | \-shinytest2:::chromote_wait_for_condition(...) 18. | \-rlang::abort(...) 19. | \-rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 20. | \-base::signalCondition(cnd) 21. +-shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 22. | \-shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 23. | \-rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call) 24. | \-rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 25. | \-base::signalCondition(cnd) 26. \-shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 27. \-shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 28. \-rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_glm_counts_Selecting_arm_var_changes_the_table_and_does_not_throw_validation_errors.

error.message: Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 60000ms.
